channel.title: +Articles on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Diving-spleen
item.description: Source: TW The man holding this squid is Bajau, a member of an Austronesian ethnic group known to spend their lives living on the water. Bajau have an amazing adaptation: they can stay underwater for a very long time. Thanks to chubby seals and Korean pearl divers, we know why. This is a Weddell Seal. He is also a wittle seal, but that’s besides the point. When these things are fully-grown, they can dive for an entire hour and descend more than 500 meters.
